name: AnythingLLM
description: Runs an all-in-one, self-hosted RAG and agents app: chat with documents, build agents, and connect tools via MCP. Desktop and Docker with an API. By Mintplex Labs.

skills.name: Document RAG
skills.description: Ingests documents into a private workspace and answers questions over them with cited retrieval.

skills.name: No-Code Agents
skills.description: Builds custom agents with tools and workflows through a no-code interface over your own data.

skills.name: MCP Tool Access
skills.description: Connects external tools and data sources via MCP so agents can act beyond the knowledge base.
